name: GIGABYTE B550M AORUS ELITE AX Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550 Chipset - Supports DDR4-4733(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen1 - DVI-D - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek GbE LAN - Wi-Fi 6E 802.11ax
shortName: GIGABYTE B550M AORUS ELITE AX Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for AM4 socket with DDR4 support, PCIe 4.0, and WiFi 6E.
